title: store: DuckDB tests (unit + e2e)
description: Unit tests in duckdb.rs (#[cfg_attr(miri, ignore)], open_in_memory): provider, schema, upsert→search round-trip + ordering, delete_by_file/glob+count, content_hashes, metadata round-trip, namespace lifecycle, dimension-mismatch, filters. Config tests for duckdb.path + WDPKR_DUCKDB_PATH + sources. Real-DuckDB e2e variant in tests/index_search_e2e.rs.

title: store: DuckDB VectorStore provider + adapter
description: New src/store/duckdb.rs implementing VectorStore + StoreProvider (name=duckdb). Single-file DB, namespace-as-column. Schema: wdpkr_meta(dimension), documents(namespace,id,vector FLOAT[dim],...,PK(namespace,id)), namespaces(...,extra MAP). Arc<Mutex<Connection>> + spawn_blocking. Brute-force search via core array_cosine_distance, score=1-dist. Register one line in store/mod.rs providers().

title: Cargo: add duckdb crate (bundled)
description: Add duckdb = { version = "1.x", features = ["bundled"] } to Cargo.toml. Bundled compiles DuckDB C++ from source (no system dep). Note increased cold-build/CI time.

title: store/config: nested per-provider config blocks
description: Refactor StoreConfig from flat {provider}_field to nested per-provider sub-blocks: StoreConfig{provider, turbopuffer{api_key}, duckdb{path}} + parallel StoreSources. Resolve via env_or_resolved/file_or_resolved. FileStoreConfig gains nested turbopuffer/duckdb blocks; keep reading deprecated flat store.turbopuffer_api_key as fallback. Update FileConfig::set keys, ResolvedConfig::entries, default_config.yaml, and StoreConfig literals in cli/config.rs + store tests. duckdb.path default $XDG_DATA_HOME/wdpkr/wdpkr.duckdb.

title: Local DuckDB vector store backend
description: Add a local, file-backed DuckDB VectorStore provider so wdpkr's storage leg no longer requires a hosted service (step one toward running fully on a Mac mini with no hosted 3rd parties). Turbopuffer stays the default; backwards compatible. Brute-force exact search via core array_cosine_distance over a fixed-size FLOAT[dim] ARRAY; HNSW-ready schema, HNSW itself deferred.
close_reason: DuckDB local store backend shipped (see child tasks).

title: Plugin system: ProcessPlugin subprocess adapter
description: Phase 7: Subprocess adapter that spawns external executables and communicates via JSON/stdio protocol.
close_reason: ProcessPlugin complete: JSON/stdio protocol, timeout, error handling, wired into build_plugin registry, 9 new tests, 470 total pass

title: Plugin system: multi-namespace search
description: Phase 8: Update search to query across all configured plugin namespaces, merge results by score.
close_reason: Multi-namespace search complete: SearchRun::new_multi, cross-namespace merge by score, source field on FileResult (backward compat), graceful skip of unindexed namespaces, 4 new tests, 474 total pass

title: Plugin system: config integration
description: Phase 5: Add plugins section to FileConfig/Config. Default to files plugin when absent.
close_reason: Config integration complete: FilePluginConfig, PluginConfig, resolve(), entries(), 6 tests, all 457 tests pass

title: Plugin system: CLI wiring + cleanup
description: Phase 6: Wire plugin config through CLI, add --plugin flag, remove old process_file.
close_reason: CLI wiring complete: build_plugin/build_plugins registry, --plugin flag, config-driven plugin construction, process_file removed, 8 new tests, 461 total pass

title: Plugin system: IndexRun refactor
description: Phase 4: Refactor IndexRun to accept Vec<Arc<dyn Plugin>> and iterate plugins with per-plugin namespaces.
close_reason: IndexRun refactored to accept Vec<Arc<dyn Plugin>>, all 451 tests pass

title: Plugin system: process_item pipeline
description: Phase 3: Add process_item() to pipeline.rs that takes SourceItem and produces VectorDocuments via summarize+embed.
close_reason: process_item() implemented and all 442 tests pass

title: Plugin system: FilesPlugin extraction
description: Phase 2: Extract current file walk/read/chunk logic from indexer into FilesPlugin implementing the Plugin trait. Cursor = git SHA.

title: Plugin system: trait, types, and MockPlugin
description: Phase 1: Define Plugin trait, FetchContext, FetchResult, SourceItem, SourceChunk types. Create MockPlugin in testing module. Wire into lib.rs.

title: File filtering: binary denylist + wire up .wdpkrignore
description: Two issues: (1) Binary files like .png are attempted and fail with 'stream did not contain valid UTF-8'. Add a built-in denylist of binary/media extensions (png, jpg, gif, pdf, wasm, zip, tar, etc.) to skip before read. (2) .wdpkrignore is created by wdpkr init but never actually read during indexing — wire it into the ignore::WalkBuilder via add_ignore().

title: Cross-file parallelism: wire up --concurrency
description: The --concurrency flag is parsed but not implemented. Wire it to tokio::sync::Semaphore so N files process concurrently. Summarization is the bottleneck (sequential Anthropic API calls per symbol), so cross-file concurrency should give 4-8x speedup.

title: Indexer observability: per-file progress and timing
description: Add per-file progress output during indexing. Show [N/total] file path (symbols) with per-step timing (summarize, embed, upsert). Running totals at end: elapsed, API calls, files processed/failed/skipped.
close_reason: Per-file progress with timing (summarize, embed) and running totals (processed, skipped, failed) printed to stderr

title: Rewrite Turbopuffer adapter from v1 to v2 API
description: Our Turbopuffer adapter sends v1 request bodies to v2 URL paths, causing 'cannot set v1 fields in a v2 request' errors. Every operation needs updating: upsert (upsert_rows, flattened attrs, distance_metric), query (rank_by, limit, array filters, rows response), delete (main endpoint, not /delete), namespace probe. Full rewrite of all HTTP types and trait implementations.
close_reason: Adapter fully rewritten to v2 API spec

title: Interactive config init + API keys in config file
description: Make config init interactive (prompt for provider/model/keys per section). Store API keys in config file alongside provider settings (env vars still override). Use provider-specific key names in YAML (voyage_api_key, not api_key) so swapping providers doesn't confuse credentials.
close_reason: Shipped in PR #25 (interactive config init + API keys in config file)

title: --dry-run mode: estimate tokens and cost without API calls
description: Index dry-run should walk the repo, chunk all files, estimate token counts for summarization + embedding, calculate cost per provider rate, and report totals — without making any API calls or writing to the store. Zero tokens spent.

title: docs: DuckDB store backend
description: src/store/CLAUDE.md DuckDB section (cosine via core array_cosine_distance, single-file/namespace-column, fixed-dim-per-file constraint, HNSW as deferred additive follow-up with caveats). Root CLAUDE.md store/ one-liner mentions DuckDB.

title: Remove LanceDB, add DuckDB as local vector store backend
description: Rip out LanceDB adapter and all its deps (arrow, lance, protobuf). Add DuckDB as a local vector store backend that links against system-installed DuckDB. No bundled compilation.

title: Add LanceDB as local vector store backend
description: Add LanceDB as a second vector store option alongside Turbopuffer. Restructure config into provider-keyed sections, implement LanceDB adapter, update config init flow.

title: Make vector store backend configurable
description: Introduce StoreProvider trait + registry pattern so vector store backends are pluggable. First implementation: turbopuffer. No match/switch dispatch — providers register in a list, each implementing StoreProvider trait for validation and construction.
close_reason: StoreProvider trait + registry implemented, turbopuffer as first provider

title: search: surface calls/called_by in search results
description: Include calls and called_by in SearchReport JSON output and --pretty rendering. When null (not yet indexed), render as 'unknown' or omit from JSON (skip_serializing_if). When Some(vec![]), render as empty. For --terse, omit call graph entirely (keep it minimal). For --pretty, show as indented list under each symbol. This gives agents the blast-radius signal without follow-up rg queries.

title: indexer: resolve cross-file call edges at index time
description: After chunking all files, build a symbol table (name → file_path + symbol_id) and resolve the raw outbound-call identifiers from the chunk phase into qualified references. Populate calls (outbound from this symbol) and called_by (inbound — other symbols that reference this one) on each VectorDocument before upsert. Resolution is best-effort: unresolved identifiers (stdlib, external deps, dynamic dispatch) are silently dropped. Incremental index only updates edges for changed files; stale edges from deleted symbols get cleaned up.
close_reason: PR #18 opened — deps wdpkr-da4 and wdpkr-qcw already merged

title: store: add calls/called_by fields to vector documents
description: Add optional calls and called_by fields to VectorDocument and SearchResult. Use Option<Vec<String>> (not Vec<String>) so null means 'not yet indexed with call-graph data' while Some(vec![]) means 'this symbol genuinely has no callers/callees'. This distinction prevents agents from assuming a symbol is a leaf node when it was just indexed before call-graph support existed. Update Turbopuffer attribute schema, mock store, and serialization.

title: chunk: extract call-graph edges from tree-sitter AST
description: During tree-sitter chunking, extract two sets of identifiers per symbol: (1) outbound calls — function/method calls and type references in the symbol body, (2) symbol's own qualified name for cross-referencing. These are raw identifiers, not resolved — resolution happens at index time by joining against the symbol table. Store as Vec<String> on the chunk output struct. This is the foundation for caller/callee metadata on vector documents.

title: search: add --terse flag for compact output
description: Compact output mode: paths + one-line summaries, no symbols. Composes with --pretty. Truncates summaries to first sentence.

title: search: add --filter glob for file path matching
description: Client-side glob matching on result file paths. Repeatable, OR logic. Uses globset crate. Applied before top_k truncation in group_results.

title: search: make --scope repeatable (multi-scope)
description: Change --scope from Option<String> to Vec<String> so users can search multiple subtrees in one call. Requires store trait change (path_prefix → path_prefixes).

title: Content-hash skip: avoid re-processing unchanged files
description: On --full reindex, hash file content and compare against stored content hash in vector store metadata. Skip summarize+embed for files whose content is unchanged. Enables kill-and-resume: re-running --full after an interrupted index skips already-indexed files without API calls.

title: Chunker tests against fixture code files
Seed eval cases (~10 from real tickets)
megagrep search CLI entry point + flag parsing
Eval runner (load cases → search → score → report)
Index pipeline (chunk → summarize → embed → upsert, bounded concurrency)
VectorStore trait + supporting types (Namespace, SearchResult, etc.)
Search orchestration (embed query → store.search → group → tiered JSON)
CI release binary packaging (linux x86_64, linux arm64, macOS arm64)
HWM advancement logic (success threshold, embedder mismatch check)
Per-language node-type maps (Go, Rust, TS/JS, Python, Java, C/C++, C#)
megagrep config subcommands (list, get, set, init, edit, path)
Big-file roll-up logic (>50K tokens → summarize from symbol summaries)
megagrep index CLI stub (clap args, not-implemented body)
Git utilities (current SHA, diff HWM..HEAD, remote URL → namespace)
docs: update claude_md template with new search flags
description: Updated CLAUDE.md template to document --terse, --filter, multi-scope, and agent best practices
close_reason: Template updated with --terse, --filter, multi-scope docs and best practices
